families.description: FAERS adverse event reports. See catalog.json.endpoints for all other openFDA endpoints.

skip.description: Pagination offset (max 25000 without key, 50000 with DATA_GOV_API_KEY)

api_key.description: api.data.gov umbrella key (raises daily rate limit)

families.description: Generic openFDA query surface. Valid (category, endpoint) pairs are listed in catalog.json.endpoints (from /download.json manifest).
Canonical manifest: every openFDA category + endpoint + bulk-download file list.

meta.disclaimer: Do not rely on openFDA to make decisions regarding medical care. While we make every effort to ensure that data is accurate, you should assume all results are unvalidated. We may limit or otherwise restrict your access to the API in line with our Terms of Service.
